name: Power Wave
description: Smash the ground with your fist and let loose a wave of energy across the ground. Useful for checking an opponent from a distance, and as a stopgap in combos.

name: Round Wave
description: Smash the ground with your fist and let loose a blast of energy in front of you. Easy to use up close, and allows you to act before an opponent even if blocked.

name: Quick Burn
description: Reels off an energy cloaked hook before coming down with a downward punch. The second attack is an overhead that can't be blocked while crouching, making it good for breaking through defenses.

name: Burning Knuckle
description: Rush forward with a thrusting punch cloaked with energy. Useful as a surprise attack to close the distance between you and your opponent.

name: Power Charge
description: A quick, forward rushing bodycheck. Useful in a combo when canceling from normal attacks. The heavy version can be canceled into another special move on hit.

name: Crack Shoot
description: A quick, falling axe kick. It is very quick, making it easy to use in combos or as a way of checking your opponent.

name: Rising Tackle
description: A rising, rotating attack. It grants immunity to jumping attacks, making it useful as an anti-air technique.

name: Buster Wolf
description: Charge forward with a piercing thrust, before firing a burst of energy. Its swift speed and invincibility can quickly turn the tables on an opponent.

name: Power Geyser
description: Unleash a volcanic explosion of energy forward. If the attack hits, input a command to transition to Twin Geyser.

name: Twin Geyser
description: (After Power Geyser hits)Performs another volcanic explosion of energy after the initial Power Geyser. Input a command to transition to Triple Geyser.

name: Triple Geyser
description: (After Twin Geyser hits)Performs a meteoric explosion of energy after Twin Geyser. Useful for when you want to maximize your damage output.

name: Rising Fang
description: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% of below)Launches the opponent into the air, then smashes them with a fist cloaked in energy. It has invincibility at the beginning, making it useful as an anti-air attack or as a way to turn the tables on your opponent.

name: Hammer Punch
description: An overhead attack that cannot be blocked while crouching.

name: Power Drive
description: A combination attack that's quick and doesn't leave you open for long even if it's blocked.

name: Power Shoot
description: A counter followed by a sequence of attacks.

name: Power Dunk
description: A highly damaging transition attack from Power Shoot.

name: Passing Sway
description: A combination attack that can transition into two possible variations.

name: Jumping Lariat
description: (After Passing Sway hits)An attack from Passing Sway that hits the opponent from the front. Hold forward to increase the distance you move forward.

name: Jumping Knee
description: (After Passing Sway hits)An attack from Passing Sway that hits the opponent from behind. Hold forward to increase the distance you move.

name: Fire Kick
description: A combination attack that can be canceled into a special move.

name: Grasping Upper
description: (When near opponent)Grab and knee the opponent in the gut before throwing them forward. Throws your opponent without switching places with them.

name: Buster Throw
description: (When near opponent)Grab your opponent and toss them behind you, placing their weight on your arm and shoulder. Throws your opponent while switching places with them.

name: Drive Impact: Back Spin Kick
description: Lunge forward with a powerful attack. Can be used to absorb an opponent's attack while launching your own offensive.

name: Drive Reversal: Back Knuckle
description: (When blocking, recovering from a knockdown, or during a successful Drive Parry)Can be used after blocking an attack to quickly turn a defensive position into an offensive one. Can also be used when recovering from a knockdown. The input can be held while downed to perform this when rising.

name: Drive Parry
description: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration)Adopt a stance that allows you to deflect all opponent strikes. This stance can be sustained by holding down the command used to activate it.

name: Parry Drive Rush
description: (During a Drive Parry)Immediately move forward from a Drive Parry stance. Normal or unique attacks performed while moving will have their properties changed.

name: Cancel Drive Rush
description: (While connecting with a special-cancelable move)Immediately move forward out of an attack. Can be performed during any special-cancelable move.
